foundations.subject: surgery
foundations.reason: Understanding the extrahepatic biliary tree and its junction with the pancreatic duct is essential for classifying Todani types

foundations.subject: surgery
foundations.reason: Choledochal cysts present with obstructive jaundice in the classic triad; biliary obstruction workup is the diagnostic pathway

clinical.subject: surgery
clinical.reason: Recurrent cholangitis is a common complication of choledochal cysts due to biliary stasis and anomalous pancreaticobiliary junction

clinical.subject: surgery
clinical.reason: Choledochal cysts carry a 10-30% lifetime risk of cholangiocarcinoma, mandating complete cyst excision

clinical.subject: surgery
clinical.reason: Post-operative biliary stricture is a key complication after hepaticojejunostomy for choledochal cyst excision

clinical.subject: surgery
clinical.reason: Biliary stasis in choledochal cysts predisposes to intracystic and intrahepatic stone formation
